column1: # Target nutrients — what a meal / day / week must deliver. Drives the planner's gap detection + rollups.
# fname = internal focus name. cadence: meal | day | week. daily = full-day target. meal = one-main-meal target.
# permeal: 1 = required every meal (drives the guided flow). 0 = optional per meal (daily/weekly — addable
# order here = order the planner walks gaps in (priority top-first).
